case_title: JESSE C RALPH ESQ VS. EXPEDIA, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,391.00 FILED BY RALPH ESQ, JESSE C AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC., A WASHINGTON CORPORATION ESA P PORTFOLIO OPERATING LESSEE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ESA P PORTFOLIO OPERATING LESSEE, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-11-2012 AT 10:00AM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 95.00 - SERVED FEB-07-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESA P PORTFOLIO OPERATING LESSEE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FOR FOR SERVICE $ 71.50 - SERVED FEB-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC., A WASHINGTON CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC., A WASHINGTON CORPORATION ESA P PORTFOLIO OPERATING LESSEE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RALPH ESQ, JESSE C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC., A WASHINGTON CORPORATION $267.84 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $267.84, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT EXTENDED STAY AMERICA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT FOR ANY AMOUNTS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
